response.justification: Bogdan is a genuinely strong staff-level generalist with 15+ years of shipping software, current hands-on MCP and agentic-workflow tooling work at Stripe, and solid TypeScript/cloud (AWS CDK) experience. However, he clearly misses the core hard requirement of 8+ years building AI-driven solutions — his GenAI exposure spans roughly one year — and the resume shows no evidence of Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, evaluation pipelines, or LLM optimization. His teaching and workshop background suggests customer-facing potential, but the AI depth gap is substantial for a Staff GenAI FDE role.
strengths: Current Staff Engineer at Stripe working directly on MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks — rare, directly relevant experience
15+ years of production engineering across TypeScript/Node.js, AWS, and high-throughput distributed systems
Proven communicator and mentor: conference talks, multi-day courses, and workshop facilitation align with FDE stakeholder-facing duties
concerns: Only ~1 year of AI/GenAI experience versus the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions
No demonstrated Python, vector database, RAG, or LLM evaluation/observability experience anywhere on the resume
No enterprise customer-facing delivery or technical discovery leadership in a consulting/forward-deployed context; resume also contains a confusing 'Founder, Datadog' entry

key_factors.factor: Hands-on MCP and agentic infrastructure at Stripe
Missing RAG, vector DB, and Python evidence
